summary: Enterprise Organization Features fully tested. Backend: 23/23 tests pass (100%). All organization management endpoints working correctly: create org, list orgs, get org detail, update org, delete org, member management (list, invite, accept, update role, remove), invite operations (list pending, cancel, my invites), and SSO configuration (get, update OIDC/SAML, disable). Frontend: All UI elements and flows working - Organizations page loads, Create org modal with name/slug/description fields, Members tab with role management, Invites tab with pending invites, SSO tab with toggle and config form, Settings tab with org info and delete button, Dashboard has Org button navigating to /organizations.

dashboard.note: This is unrelated to the organization feature being tested - pre-existing issue

critical_code_review_comments: Good: SSO client secret properly masked when returned (shows *** + last 4 chars)
Good: Role-based permissions enforced (owner-only for SSO config, admin for invites)
Good: All required data-testid attributes present for testing
Good: Invite flow properly validates email matching
Good: Cannot invite with 'owner' role (400 error)
Good: Duplicate slug check on org creation (400 error)
Good: Duplicate invite check for same email (400 error)
Good: Non-members get 403 when trying to access org details
Good: Owner cannot be removed from org
Good: Organization deletion cascades (removes members, invites, updates user records)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all UI elements and flows working

seed_data_creation: Organization 'Acme Legal Corp' (slug: acme-legal) exists with demo@test.com as owner and admin@notarychain.com as admin member
context_for_next_testing_agent: Organization Enterprise features fully tested. Collections: organizations, org_members, org_invites. User roles: owner (full control), admin (manage members/invites), member (view only). SSO supports OIDC and SAML providers. Invite flow: admin invites email -> token generated -> invited user calls /my/invites -> accepts with /accept-invite/{token}. Client secret masked on read (*** + last 4 chars). Pre-existing orgs: 'Acme Legal Corp' (slug: acme-legal), 'Updated Organization' created during tests.

backend_api.POST /api/organizations/: Create org with name, slug, description - PASS
backend_api.GET /api/organizations/: List user's organizations with role - PASS
backend_api.POST /api/organizations/{org_id}/invite: Invite member by email (admin only) - PASS
backend_api.GET /api/organizations/my/invites: List current user's pending invites - PASS

frontend_ui.create_org_modal: Opens with name, slug, description inputs - PASS
frontend_ui.members_tab: Shows members with roles and avatars - PASS
frontend_ui.invite_modal: Opens with email and role inputs - PASS
frontend_ui.sso_tab: Shows toggle and config form when enabled - PASS
frontend_ui.settings_tab: Shows org info and delete button for owner - PASS
frontend_ui.role_dropdown: Shows for owner to change member roles - PASS

mocked_apis.note: SSO authentication flow is config-only (stores settings but doesn't execute actual SAML/OIDC auth - this is expected for enterprise SSO where the IdP handles the actual auth)
